details: The scheme "Mukhyamantri Kanya Abhibhavak Pension Yojana" was launched by the Public Health and Family Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to provide financial support to parents or couples who have only daughters. The scheme provides a recurring monthly pension amount of ₹500/- (Rupees 500) to the eligible recipient or couple. The applicant must be a resident of the state, and one member of the applying couple or the single individual must have a minimum age of 60 years. The scheme is implemented by the appropriate government department, and applications are primarily accepted via the official portal at www.mpedistrict.gov.in or via designated offline channels.
benefits: A monthly pension amount of ₹500/- (Rupees 500) is provided.
The funds are deposited into the joint savings account of the applicant couple or the single applicant's account maintained at a nationalized bank or Post Office.
*The beneficiary must continue to fulfill the established eligibility criteria as defined in the rules so that the benefits are not recalled.
eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradeah.
The applicant couple or the single applicant must have a minimum age of 60 years for at least one person at the time of application.
The applicant couple or the single applicant must have only daughters.
The applicant must belong to the Below Poverty Line category.

online: Madhya Pradesh Lok Sewa Guarantee Portal
In the registration page, provide the following mandatory information: Name, Gender, Mobile No., Email ID.
Create a new password and confirm the same. Fill the captcha code. Verify your Mobile Number via OTP. Finally, click "Register".
Login using your registered Email ID and the password created during registration.

On the homepage, sort the list of services "By Department". Further, select the Department and the respective scheme that you intend to apply for. On the next page, detailed information about the scheme will be displayed.

In the scheme's online application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and upload all the mandatory documents in the specified format and size (fields marked with * are mandatory), and click "Submit".
Alternatively, you may apply via your nearest Lok Sewa Kendra / MP Online / CSC by making a payment of ₹20/-.

documents_required: The applicants are not required to attach or upload any documents when submitting the application form.

However, the applicants will need to have certain documents available to reference, as the applicants be asked to enter specific document numbers or identification details in the mandatory fields of the form.
It is recommend to keep the following on hand while completing the application:
Any certificates or credentials referenced in the form.
Other supporting documents that contain reference numbers you may need to input.
sources_and_references: Locate Your Nearest Lok Sewa Kendra

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement that needs to be fulfilled by at least one person in the applying couple or by a single applicant?
faqs.answer: At least one member of the applying couple or the single applicant must have attained a minimum age of 60 years at the time of submitting the application.

faqs.question: Is there any specific economic category requirement that applicants must fulfill to be considered eligible for receiving the monthly pension benefit?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must belong to the Below Poverty Line category to qualify for this pension benefit.

faqs.question: What is the exact monthly pension amount that eligible recipients or couples will receive under this financial assistance program?
faqs.answer: Eligible recipients or couples will receive a monthly pension amount of ₹500/- (Rupees Five Hundred) under this financial assistance program.

faqs.question: How frequently are the pension benefits disbursed to the beneficiaries who have been approved under this financial support initiative?
faqs.answer: The pension benefits are disbursed on a monthly basis to all approved beneficiaries under this financial support initiative.

faqs.question: Are there any specific conditions or ongoing obligations that beneficiaries must continue to meet after selection to ensure the benefits are not withdrawn or recalled?
faqs.answer: Yes, beneficiaries must continue to fulfill the established eligibility criteria as defined in the rules to ensure that the benefits are not recalled.

faqs.question: Through which banking channels or institutions are the pension funds deposited for the beneficiaries receiving this monthly financial assistance?
faqs.answer: The pension funds are deposited into the joint savings account of the applicant couple or the single applicant's account maintained at a nationalized bank or Post Office.

faqs.question: What is the primary residential requirement that must be satisfied by individuals or couples wishing to apply for this monthly pension support?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh to satisfy the primary residential requirement for this monthly pension support.

faqs.question: Is there any specific requirement regarding the gender composition of children that applicants must meet to qualify for this pension program?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant couple or the single applicant must have only daughters to meet the eligibility requirements for this pension program.

faqs.question: What is the official website portal address where applicants can access the online registration and application services for this pension scheme?
faqs.answer: The official website portal for accessing online registration and application services is www.mpedistrict.gov.in, which is the Madhya Pradesh Lok Sewa Guarantee Portal.

faqs.question: During the registration process on the official portal, what mandatory personal information must be provided by citizens creating a new account?
faqs.answer: During registration, citizens must provide the following mandatory information: Name, Gender, Mobile Number, and Email Identity. They must also create and confirm a password.

faqs.question: Are applicants required to upload or attach physical documents when submitting the online application form for this monthly pension benefit?
faqs.answer: No, applicants are not required to attach or upload any documents when submitting the application form online. However, they should keep relevant documents handy to reference specific document numbers or identification details required in mandatory fields.

faqs.question: What is the alternative offline application method available for applicants who prefer not to apply through the online portal themselves?
faqs.answer: Applicants may alternatively apply through their nearest Lok Sewa Kendra, Madhya Pradesh Online center, or Common Service Centre by making a payment of ₹20/-.

faqs.question: After logging into the portal, how should applicants navigate to locate the specific scheme they wish to apply for among various government services?
faqs.answer: After logging in, applicants should sort the list of services by selecting "By Department" on the homepage, then select the appropriate Department and the respective scheme they intend to apply for.

faqs.question: What verification steps are required during the citizen registration process to ensure the authenticity of the mobile number provided by the applicant?
faqs.answer: During registration, applicants must verify their Mobile Number via One Time Password. They must also fill in the captcha code before completing the registration process.
